title: Deliver an autonomous Codex workflow
objective: Coordinate planning, implementation and QA through an orchestrator agent.
acceptance_criteria: Packages are assigned to matching agent capabilities.
Blockers lead to explicit unblock packages.

packages.title: Plan the operating model
packages.description: Define the multi-agent roles, status model and message contract.

packages.title: Verify the workflow
packages.description: Run end-to-end validation over the orchestrated flow.
